title: Notification when specific Customer is selected

posts.author: jhammond (Jackie Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
I thought my automation was pretty easy/straightforward, but I can’t seem to find anything that will work.

In our Deals board, I have a column for Customer and Company name. I would like an automation to send the owner of the item a Notification if a specific customer or company is selected (either column would work at this point). To give context, at times we might have a high maintenance customer, so when we are quoting a deal for them, we need to add money for the extra PM time, or customer visit time, etc.

image889×277 17.1 KB
